---
format:
  typst:
    papersize: us-letter
    margin:
      top: 0.75in
      bottom: 0.75in
      left: 0.6in
      right: 0.6in
    grid:
      body-width: 5.5in
      margin-width: 1.5in
      gutter-width: 0.3in
    columns: 2
    page-numbering: "1"
    keep-typ: true
---

```{=typst}
#let para(h) = {
  block(fill: rgb("#d6d6d6"), width: 100%, height: h, radius: 1pt, breakable: true)
  v(0.5em)
}
#para(3.6cm)
#para(2.6cm)
#para(3.0cm)
#para(2.2cm)
#para(2.8cm)
#para(2.4cm)
#para(5.0cm)
#para(2.0cm)
#para(2.7cm)
#para(2.3cm)
#para(2.9cm)
```

::: {.column-margin}
```{=typst}
#block(fill: rgb("#cfcfcf"), width: 100%, height: 3.6cm, radius: 1pt)
```
:::
